name: Bovine Rumen (BMDB normal metabolome)
description: Bovine Rumen medium from the Bovine Metabolome Database (BMDB) normal (healthy-subject) metabolite concentrations, mapped to BiGG exchanges, with a mineral base. Concentrations are medians of reported normal values (concentration_mM); original HMDB values retained per component.

provenance.citation: Bovine Metabolome Database (BMDB; Foroutan A et al., 2020, bovinedb.ca), normal bovine Rumen concentrations. Primary refs PMID: 10692998, 10707763, 12093193, 12413088, 15135111, 16162538, 18328751, 21524548, 22706048, 22959937.
provenance.notes: Normal-condition concentrations only; medians across reports; units converted to mM where MW/units allowed. Presence-based uptake bounds; concentration_mM + hmdb_orig retained. Mineral base added.
